2606.08590.title: Auditable Graph-Guided Root Cause Analysis for Kubernetes Incidents
2606.08590.paper_summary: Kubernetes incidents are diagnosed reliably only when a root-cause system's reported gains come from incident evidence rather than scenario-specific shortcuts. We present Graph Traversal Agent, a graph-guided RCA agent that combines LLM reasoning with specialized tools. The model reasons over a typed evidence graph, while deterministic graph and tool operations collect evidence, bound the search, and check proposed verdicts. We map operational constraints, including read-only evidence collection, propagation-aware diagnosis, bounded execution, and independently validated verdicts, to a typed incident graph, a LangGraph traversal state machine, and a separate validation stage. On ITBench snapshots scored by one fixed qwen-plus judge, the audited system raises root-cause-entity F1 over an earlier iteration of the same system from 0.6087 to 0.9130 on a 23-scenario common subset. A prompt-level ablation separates prompt-tuned gains from gains that survive once scenario-specific hints are removed: the stripped-prompt configuration retains 0.6958 F1 on a 19-scenario subset. The surviving gain concentrates on ChaosMesh scenarios whose ground-truth root cause is the injected fault object already present in the evidence graph, so we report it as benchmark-coupled rather than broad cross-cluster RCA evidence. Lightweight checks, including same-judge comparison, prompt-level ablation, cascade-source checking, and a telemetry no-leak test, mark claims as supported, pending, or out of scope. We scope the work to ITBench OpenTelemetry-demo snapshots. Live-cluster trials served as an engineering stress test, but alert state and trace availability did not stay stable enough for controlled scoring, so we make no production-readiness or mean-time-to-repair claim.
2606.08590.paper_summary_zh: Kubernetes 事件只有在根本原因系統的報告收益來自事件證據而非特定場景的捷徑時，才能可靠地診斷。我們提出了 Graph Traversal Agent，一個結合 LLM 推理與專用工具的圖形引導 RCA 代理。該模型在一個類型化的證據圖上進行推理，而確定性的圖形和工具操作則收集證據、限制搜索並檢查提出的判決。我們將操作約束映射到一個類型化的事件圖、一個 LangGraph 遍歷狀態機和一個單獨的驗證階段，包括只讀證據收集、考慮傳播的診斷、有界執行和獨立驗證的判決。在由一個固定的 qwen-plus 評委評分的 ITBench 快照中，經過審核的系統在 23 個場景的共同子集上，將根本原因實體 F1 從 0.6087 提高到 0.9130，超過了同一系統的早期迭代。一個提示級別的消融實驗將提示調整的收益與在移除特定場景提示後仍然存在的收益分開：剝離提示配置在 19 個場景的子集上保持 0.6958 F1。存活的收益集中在 ChaosMesh 場景，其真實根本原因是已存在於證據圖中的注入故障對象，因此我們將其報告為基準耦合，而非廣泛的跨集群 RCA 證據。輕量級檢查，包括同評委比較、提示級別消融、級聯源檢查和遙測無洩漏測試，將聲明標記為支持、待定或超出範圍。我們將工作範圍限定在 ITBench OpenTelemetry-demo 快照上。實時集群試驗作為工程壓力測試，但警報狀態和追蹤可用性未能保持足夠穩定以進行控制評分，因此我們不提出生產就緒性或平均修復時間的聲明。
2606.08590.author: Anastasiia Kuvshinova et.al.
